About Me

Hi, I'm Egi Pebriyawan, a passionate Web Developer focusing on building intuitive and scalable web applications.

A graduate (S1 - Information Technology) and currently pursuing the Professional Teacher Education Program (PPG) at the postgraduate level.

Professional K-12 teacher dedicated to mastering new tech and writing clean, efficient, maintainable code. Empowering the next generation through technical excellence and modern pedagogy.

Professional Teacher Education (PPG) — Postgraduate Program

Currently pursuing PPG to become a certified professional teacher while continuing to develop skills in web development.

Operations & Technical Support

PT Indomarco Prismatama (Indomaret)

2020 – 2026

IT Support & Network Security: Responsible for hardware maintenance, network troubleshooting, and ensuring system security protocols within the office environment.
